# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud monitoring and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Web/sites"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    name: "[parameters('webAppName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]"
      httpsOnly: true
      siteConfig:
        alwaysOn: true
        minTlsVersion: "1.2"

  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdminUsername')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
    resources:
      - type: "databases"
        apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
        name: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
        properties:
          collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
          maxSizeBytes: "2147483648"
          requestedServiceObjective: "S0"

  - type: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"
    apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard_LRS"
      tier: "Standard"
    kind: "StorageV2"
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true

parameters:
  webAppName:
    type: string
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "East US"
  appServicePlanName:
    type: string
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
  sqlAdminUsername:
    type: string
  sqlAdminPassword:
    type: securestring
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
  storageAccountName:
    type: string

outputs:
  webAppUrl:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('https://', parameters('webAppName'), '.azurewebsites.net')]"
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net')]"
  storageAccountEndpoint:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('https://', parameters('storageAccountName'), '.blob.core.windows.net')]"

# Self-review findings:
# - The SQL Server admin password is stored as a secure string, which is a good practice.
# - HTTPS is enforced for the web app and storage account.
# - No public access to the SQL server is defined, which could expose it to the internet.

# Final secure version:
$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Web/sites"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    name: "[parameters('webAppName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]"
      httpsOnly: true
      siteConfig:
        alwaysOn: true
        minTlsVersion: "1.2"

  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdminUsername')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      publicNetworkAccess: "Disabled" # Ensuring SQL Server is not publicly accessible
    resources:
      - type: "databases"
        apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
        name: "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
        properties:
          collation: "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
          maxSizeBytes: "2147483648"
          requestedServiceObjective: "S0"

  - type: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"
    apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard_LRS"
      tier: "Standard"
    kind: "StorageV2"
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true

parameters:
  webAppName:
    type: string
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "East US"
  appServicePlanName:
    type: string
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
  sqlAdminUsername:
    type: string
  sqlAdminPassword:
    type: securestring
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
  storageAccountName:
    type: string

outputs:
  webAppUrl:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('https://', parameters('webAppName'), '.azurewebsites.net')]"
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net')]"
  storageAccountEndpoint:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('https://', parameters('storageAccountName'), '.blob.core.windows.net')]"
